summary: Tested Badges and Levels System (نظام الشارات والمستويات) - P2 feature. All backend APIs working correctly (11/11 tests passed). Frontend badges page fully functional with team badges, level badges, achievement badges, leaderboard, and stats tabs.

issues: Level shows as '_97' instead of just '97' - appears to be a display formatting issue with underscore prefix

action_items: Minor: Fix level display showing '_97' instead of '97' on badges page header
context_for_next_testing_agent: Badges and Levels System (P2) fully tested. Backend endpoints: GET /api/badges/all (returns 27 badges: 8 team, 5 level, 14 achievement), GET /api/badges/leaderboard, GET /api/badges/user/{user_id}, GET /api/badges/stats/{user_id}, POST /api/badges/select-team. Frontend: /badges page with 3 tabs (Badges, Leaderboard, Stats), team badge selection works with toast notification, level progress bar shows XP progress, leaderboard shows top users sorted by XP.

backend_apis.GET /api/badges/all: WORKING - Returns 27 badges (8 team, 5 level, 14 achievement)
backend_apis.GET /api/badges/leaderboard: WORKING - Returns users sorted by XP descending
backend_apis.GET /api/badges/user/{user_id}: WORKING - Returns user badges, level_progress, selected_team_badge
backend_apis.GET /api/badges/stats/{user_id}: WORKING - Returns messages_sent, gifts_sent/received, rooms_created, total_hours
backend_apis.POST /api/badges/select-team: WORKING - Selects team badge and adds to user badges

frontend_badges_page.badges_tab: WORKING - Shows team badges (8), level badges (5 with min_level requirements), achievement badges (14)
frontend_badges_page.leaderboard_tab: WORKING - Shows top 3 users prominently, rest in list with rank, username, level, XP
frontend_badges_page.stats_tab: WORKING - Shows messages sent, gifts sent/received, rooms created, hours online, badges count, XP sources info
frontend_badges_page.team_selection: WORKING - Click team badge shows 'Team selected' toast, badge highlighted with green dot
frontend_badges_page.level_progress: WORKING - Shows current level, XP, progress bar with percentage
